This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Windows 11 version 26H2 lands soon, and these are 10 things you need to know before upgrading  Windows Central
  2. 5 Windows 11 features from July’s update you shouldn’t overlook  PCWorld
  3. Microsoft paused Windows 11 KB5101650 on these Dell PCs due to shutdowns, verify if yours is affected  Windows Latest
  4. Windows 11 KB5121767 out to fix system performance issues caused by KB5101650, KB5095093  Neowin
  5. 10 Future Windows 11 Features You Can Try Today  PCMag

item.title: Google Rebrands NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook with Drive Sync - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Google Rebrands NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook with Drive Sync  Geeky Gadgets
  2. NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook  blog.google
  3. Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook  TechCrunch
  4. NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook, with 3.5 + Antigravity upgrade coming to AI Pro  9to5Google
  5. I added one line to my NotebookLM prompts, and the difference was immediate  XDA

item.title: Fitbit’s Whoop Challenger Quietly Added a Game-Changing Upgrade - Gear Patrol
item.description: Fitbit’s Whoop Challenger Quietly Added a Game-Changing Upgrade  Gear PatrolSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News
